chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.object: an individual or entity registered on the platform

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.predicate: has unit price at time of order
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order

entities_post_resolution.name: Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: A business entity representing a classification category with a unique identifier and a human-readable name.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Category         → TB_CATEGORY | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: Date order was placed.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line in a sales order that specifies the product, quantity, and unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | Key Attributes:
- Quantity of units ordered | Key Attributes:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Key Attributes:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO | | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Ite

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A self-referential foreign key column in the TB_CATEGORY table that stores the parent category's CATEGORY_ID to model a hierarchical category structure.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference]

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A payment transaction recorded against a sales order, identified by a unique payment ID, with attributes such as method, amount, timestamp, and status, and potentially multiple payments per order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: PRODUCT_ID is the unique identifier (primary key) for a product in a catalog.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment record representing the physical movement of goods for a single sales order, including source warehouse, destination address, shipped timestamp, tracking number, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: Product category dimension table whose rows form a hierarchical tree of categories, identified by CATEGORY_ID (with a self-referential parent relationship).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | **Foreign Keys**:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference]

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master(Cust Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master customer entity representing the canonical record for all registered platform customers, identified by the CUST_ID primary key.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER

entities_post_resolution.name: Whether Customer Can
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Customer Address represents the delivery/shipping address associated with a customer for shipments in the e-commerce system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | Definition: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | Business Context: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | Key Attributes:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | Business Rules:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | Business Rules:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Key Attributes:
- References exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|------------

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At
entities_post_resolution.definition: The per-unit price charged for a product on a specific order at the time the order was placed (historical price used for line-item calculations).
synonyms: unit price at time of order
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | Key Attributes:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: STATUS_CODE is a coded column representing the current status of an order or shipment (e.g., PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: A policy that allows customers to return products within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Unique Customer Identifier
entities_post_resolution.definition: Unique customer identifier: a column that uniquely identifies a customer record (e.g., CUST_ID).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Addresses
entities_post_resolution.definition: A collection of address records associated with a customer, categorized by address type (e.g., delivery, billing), with at most one primary address per type.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | Business Rules:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition: Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identity, contact information, regional assignment, and status indicating whether the customer is active in the system.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, SKU, name, category, price, and whether the product is active.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical categories for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header information for sales orders, including identifiers, customer reference, order date, total amount, status, and timestamps for payment confirmation, delivery, and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual items that constitute each order, including product reference, quantity, unit price, and total line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments applied to customer orders, including the method and amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores details about each shipment, linking to the related sales order and tracking information, including where it ships from, when it was shipped, and its current status.
